历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 4145 → 3417 → 15586 → 9083 → 5669 respectively. After a severe gap in 2023, rankings have been recovering continuously, reaching 5669 in 2025, with a cumulative improvement of approximately 9917 positions over the past two years, but still lagging behind the 2021–2022 levels (3417–4145). The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 3 students each in 2021–2022, 2 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 2 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 2 students, unchanged from 2025, with a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. The 2026 reputation assessment is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 49th (relatively hot), with moderate to high overall attention. No records of enrollment gaps were observed.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline. Although it is a language-oriented university, the Data Science and Big Data Technology major combines natural language processing, forming an interdisciplinary feature with the university's strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology falls under the popular computer/big data direction. In 2024, the popularity of computer-related fields was rated as "Recommended," and electronic information/communication fields as "Highly Recommended," with related majors generally being hot. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 113,560, a slight decrease of about 3,847 from 117,407 in 2025, easing competition pressure. The provincial control score for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 360 points, remaining stable in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous recovery of rankings in 2025 but still having room to historical highs, unchanged enrollment plan, slight decrease in total candidates, and high popularity of Data Science major, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly improve from 5669, mainly due to the hot direction of Data Science and Big Data Technology and the university's rising ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5619, with a range of 5119–6119.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Natural Language Processing and Financial Big Data).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Physics Category only enrolls one major, Data Science and Big Data Technology. If the ranking falls within the predicted range (5119–6119), active application is recommended. Rankings better than the lower limit (<5119) have a high admission probability. Rankings near the upper limit (>6119) can be considered as a reach.
